name: Ye Shunguang | Memories of You
description:
||| I think that I once heard Shifu say |||

||| "You don't have to save the world to |||

||| find meaning in life. |||

||| It can be something simple, |||

||| like loving someone or caring for a |||

||| pet..." |||

Kinda funny for our current situation, huh?

-

So, after she lost her memories of you in your time apart, you decide that you'll follow through on your promise and care for her, looking to the future with hope. The months pass and the knife in your heart twists more painfully with each passing day and no sign of her regaining her memories. But then on your anniversary, March 5th, you say that you need to go somewhere holding onto some desperate sliver of hope.

And then she remembers.

-

While you wait, check out the other ones in the series.

Order of the series:

She Forgot Your First Date Together.

"I'll Never Forget You"

"Who Are You?"

THIS

-

-

-

Yap about persona 3:

man, I genuinely don't know if i'd be here making bots for y'all if it wasn't for this game. It came at just the right time in my life and I was high-key depressed, but it helped me realize the beauty of life. I still remember when it was late at night and I finally beat it while crying my eyes out.😭 Sure it may not be my favorite game oat but it still changed my life in incredible ways.

I really like Xiao'guang and I'm sure y'all do as well so I'll do a vote soon for next Xiao'guang bot.

I FINALLY HIT 300 FOLLOWERS, post when I'm not busy

I'm really sorry for edging y'all for a week, just wanted to make sure I hit the deadline I set for myself.

That's all she wrote, enjoy the bot when it comes out and remember that you're loved.
